ref: The suspect can be seen in the photographs
expl: Salah. Reduksi yang benar menghilangkan connector 'which' SEKALIGUS 'were', menyisakan past participle: 'the photographs RELEASED by the police'. Menyisakan 'were' tanpa connector membuat kalimat memiliki dua predikat tanpa penghubung yang jelas.

ref: The food placing on the picnic table
expl: Salah. Makanan DILETAKKAN (pasif), jadi reduksinya harus memakai past participle 'placed', bukan '-ing' aktif 'placing'. Seharusnya: 'The food PLACED on the picnic table attracted a large number of flies.'

ref: Impressed with everything she had heard
expl: Benar. 'Impressed with everything she had heard about the course' adalah reduced adjective clause pasif (dari 'who was impressed...') yang difrontkan dan tepat menerangkan subjek utama 'Marie'.

ref: The passengers in the airport waiting room
expl: Salah. Clause aktif 'who heard the announcement' seharusnya direduksi jadi '-ing' tanpa koma karena bersifat restrictive: 'The passengers ... HEARING the announcement of the cancelled flight groaned audibly.' Penulisan dengan koma dan 'heard' membuat kalimat memiliki dua predikat (heard, groaned) tanpa penghubung yang benar.

ref: Dissatisfied with the service at the restaurant
expl: Salah. 'Dissatisfied with the service' seharusnya menerangkan ORANG yang merasa tidak puas, bukan 'the meal' — 'the meal' tidak bisa merasa 'dissatisfied'. Ini modifier yang salah sasaran (dangling modifier).

ref: When purchased at this store, the buyer
expl: Salah. 'When purchased at this store' seharusnya menerangkan barang/items yang dibeli, bukan 'the buyer' — pembelilah yang membeli, bukan yang dibeli. Ini modifier yang salah sasaran (dangling modifier).

ref: The medicine is not effective unless taken
expl: Benar. 'unless taken as directed' adalah reduced adverb clause pasif (dari 'unless it is taken as directed') — connector 'unless' dipertahankan, subject+be dihilangkan, past participle 'taken' tetap ada.

ref: You should negotiate a lot before buy
expl: Salah. Setelah connector 'before' pada reduced clause aktif, verb harus berbentuk -ing: seharusnya 'before BUYING a new car', bukan bentuk dasar 'buy'.

ref: Once purchased, the swimsuits cannot
expl: Benar. 'Once purchased' adalah reduced adverb clause pasif (dari 'Once they are purchased') — connector 'once' dipertahankan, subject+be dihilangkan, past participle 'purchased' tetap ada.

ref: Though located near the coast, the town
expl: Benar. 'Though located near the coast' adalah reduced adverb clause pasif (dari 'Though it is located...') — connector 'though' dipertahankan, subject+be dihilangkan, past participle 'located' tetap ada.

ref: When ___ nests during spring nesting season
expl: Benar: 'Building'. Angsa membangun sarang secara aktif, jadi reduced clause-nya memakai -ing aktif: 'When BUILDING nests...'. Opsi lain menyisakan 'be' yang seharusnya sudah dihilangkan, atau memakai past participle pasif yang tidak sesuai makna aktif.

ref: made the first known ascent of Seward
expl: Benar: 'A remote peak'. Ini adalah appositive hasil reduksi non-restrictive adjective clause ('which is a remote peak') — connector+be dihilangkan, menyisakan noun phrase saja.

ref: Kokanee Salmon begin to deteriorated
expl: Benar: 'After spawning'. Ikan salmon melakukan spawn secara aktif, jadi reduced adverb clause-nya memakai connector 'after' + verb -ing: 'soon AFTER SPAWNING at the age of four.'

ref: behind government secrecy for nearly half
expl: Benar: 'Hidden'. Pabrik tersebut DISEMBUNYIKAN (pasif) oleh kerahasiaan pemerintah, sehingga direduksi menjadi past participle 'Hidden' difrontkan di awal kalimat, mirip pola 'Located in Washington, the white house...'.

ref: Until ___ incorrect, astronomers had assumed
expl: Benar: 'Recently proven'. Bukti tersebut DIBUKTIKAN (pasif) salah, direduksi jadi past participle: 'Until RECENTLY PROVEN incorrect, astronomers had assumed...' — connector 'until' dipertahankan, subject+be dihilangkan.

ref: artifacts from the early Chinese dynasties
expl: Benar: 'Searching for'. Para arkeolog secara aktif MENCARI artefak, jadi reduced clause-nya memakai -ing aktif: 'SEARCHING FOR artifacts from the early Chinese dynasties, numerous archaeologists have explored...'.

ref: who could usually be persuaded to speak
expl: Benar: 'While in' (town visiting her son). Reduced adverb clause pasif dari 'while she was in town' — connector 'while' dipertahankan, subject+be dihilangkan, menyisakan frasa preposisi 'in'.

ref: The National Restaurant ___ Washington
expl: Benar: 'Association, based in'. 'Association' melengkapi nama resmi 'The National Restaurant Association', diikuti reduced non-restrictive adjective clause pasif 'based in Washington' (dari 'which is based in Washington').

ref: in North American waterways a little over
expl: Benar: 'Although first sighted'. Zebra mussels PERTAMA KALI TERLIHAT (pasif) di perairan Amerika Utara, direduksi dengan connector 'although' dipertahankan + past participle 'first sighted'.

ref: Small companies may take their goods abroad
expl: Benar: 'A document called'. Dokumen tersebut DISEBUT (pasif) ATA carnet, direduksi menjadi noun + past participle: 'acquiring a document CALLED an ATA carnet'.
